title: A focused nephrology practice, built around the patients of western Odisha.
lead: SS Kidney Care opened in Sambalpur in 2023 with a simple idea — that advanced kidney care should be specialist-led, locally available, and honestly explained. Dr. Sourav Shristi runs it as a full-time clinic practice alongside his role as Asst. Professor in the Department of Nephrology, VIMSAR Burla.
vimsar_paragraph: Dr. Shristi's academic role at VIMSAR — where he teaches the next generation of nephrologists alongside his clinic practice — keeps the standard of care here in step with what's taught at a government medical college. It also gives him direct access to a renal-pathology partnership for kidney biopsies, and to the regional research community studying the kidney problems specific to the Hirakud agricultural belt.

how_we_practice.name: Thirty-minute first consults
how_we_practice.body: We sit with you, look at your reports, and walk through what's actually happening — in the time it takes to do that properly.

how_we_practice.name: Plain Odia or Hindi at home
how_we_practice.body: If your family speaks Odia or Hindi at home, that's the language we use to explain the diagnosis and the plan. English is offered, not assumed.

how_we_practice.name: No upsell
how_we_practice.body: If you don't need a procedure, we'll tell you. If a particular test would change the plan, we'll explain why before we order it.

how_we_practice.name: Wednesday follow-up calls
how_we_practice.body: When we start a new medication or change a dose, you can expect a call from us on the next Wednesday to ask how it's settling in.

how_we_practice.name: Second opinions welcome
how_we_practice.body: Even when our answer matches the first opinion, we'll explain why so you leave with the picture, not just the verdict.

how_we_practice.name: Multi-organ workup
how_we_practice.body: Kidney problems rarely live alone. We assess the kidney alongside heart, diabetes and BP — under one consultation, not three referrals.
